source: Generated from a per-system Morphous manifest and prompt records. CSS variables are shadcn/tweakcn-compatible.
typography: Playful recipe English UI with Japanese typography guidance for recipe titles, ingredient tables, preparation steps, status chips, and readable kitchen dashboards.
layout: Recipe cards, pantry dashboards, 8px radii, circular leaf-inspired controls, tangerine primary actions, pepper-red accents, round leaf success states, and warm edible-garden surfaces.

prompts.label: Transparent nasturtium blossom motif
prompts.prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous Nasturtium transparent motif chroma-key source
Primary request: Create a complete nasturtium blossom motif for a design-system catalog, isolated on a removable chroma-key background.
Subject: An edible garden nasturtium blossom with tangerine-orange and pepper-red petals, round green leaves, slender stems, warm botanical texture, and crisp natural edges. It should read clearly as nasturtium.
Composition/framing: centered complete blossom and round leaves with generous padding, no cropping.
Chroma-key background: perfectly flat solid #0000ff background for removal, uniform color only, no shadow, gradient, texture, reflection, floor plane, watermark, or text.
Constraints: no marigold, no poppy, no hibiscus, no plate, no kitchen props, no hand, no landscape.

prompts.label: Light-mode design-system board
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Nasturtium light-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive light-mode shadcn/tweakcn design-system board named Morphous Nasturtium, derived from the visible nasturtium blossom cutout.
Canvas: wide 16:9 high-resolution board, polished playful recipe-system presentation.
Required visible sections: Morphous Nasturtium, Nasturtium Blossom, Palette, Typography, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard/Data, Forms, Table, Command/Search, Status States, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens, Asset Examples.
Reference use: Extract tangerine blossoms, pepper-red accents, round leaf-green controls, edible garden warmth, kitchen-cream surfaces, and circular leaf geometry for recipes, meal planning, pantry dashboards, and food-content workflows.
UI coverage: buttons, icon buttons, inputs, selects, textarea, checkboxes, radios, switches, tabs, badges, alerts, recipe cards, ingredient tables, command palette, sidebar, metrics, charts, forms, empty/loading/error/success states, texture samples, spacing, radius, border, shadow, and token swatches.
Constraints: no generic orange UI, no unrelated neon colors, no marigold confusion, no tiny unreadable text, no watermark, no misspelling of Morphous Nasturtium.

prompts.label: Dark-mode design-system board
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Nasturtium dark-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive dark-mode shadcn/tweakcn board for Morphous Nasturtium that feels like the light board translated to dark mode.
Canvas: wide 16:9 high-resolution board, polished professional design-system presentation.
Required visible sections: Morphous Nasturtium, Nasturtium Blossom, Dark Mode, Palette, Typography, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard/Data, Forms, Table, Command/Search, Status States, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens, Asset Examples.
Reference use: Preserve tangerine actions, pepper-red emphasis, round leaf-green success, warm recipe-cream foregrounds, garden-soil dark surfaces, and playful recipe workflow structure.
Constraints: no neon palette, no generic black UI, no unrelated colors, no tiny text, no watermark, no misspelling of Morphous Nasturtium.
